label: Baseline
noted_behavior: Baseline: Stable gradual improvement. Reward climbs steadily good reference.

label: High LR
noted_behavior: High LR (5e-4): Fast early gains but reward fluctuates; slight divergence near end.

label: Low LR
noted_behavior: Low LR (1e-5): Extremely slow convergence; barely improves within 150k steps.

label: Low Gamma
noted_behavior: Low Gamma (0.95): Short-sighted; agent reacts to nearby bricks, not strategic.

label: Very Low Gamma
noted_behavior: Very Low Gamma (0.90): Near-zero strategic depth; worst reward across all experiments.

label: Medium-High LR
noted_behavior: Medium-High LR (2e-4): Slightly faster than baseline with marginally better peak.

label: Very High Gamma
noted_behavior: Very High Gamma (0.999): Over-values future; slow to exploit easy nearby bricks.

label: Low LR + Slightly Low Gamma
noted_behavior: Low LR + Low Gamma (5e-5/0.98): Very conservative; stable but plateaus early.

label: Med LR + Low Gamma
noted_behavior: Med LR + Low Gamma (3e-4/0.97): Moderate speed and reward decent trade-off.

label: Larger Batch + Lower Eps End
noted_behavior: Larger Batch + Low Eps End (64/0.01): More exploitation late; highest final reward.
